Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Understand the Goal Transform a raw Windows activity system log into a structured process mining event log Group events into logical cases for example working on a specific document or email translate raw low level actions into meaningful higher level activities and output a table along with a brief explanation of the logic

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Determine Cases The prompt suggests a case represents a logical unit of user work such as editing a specific document or handling an email Looking at the logs the window and document titles clearly demarcate distinct units of work

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Case 1 Quarterly Report docx Case 2 Document1 docx Case 3 Email Annual Meeting Case 4 Report Draft pdf Case 5 Budget 2024 xlsx

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Determine Activity Names High level process steps Raw actions like FOCUS TYPING SAVE SWITCH CLICK SCROLL HIGHLIGHT CLOSE need to be consolidated into meaningful activities per case

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets use clear standardized process steps based on the action and object type

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - PE
Text: Alternative Activity Naming simpler more standardized Instead of naming every step uniquely per app use a standard vocabulary

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The prompt explicitly gives examples editing a specific document handling a particular email or reviewing a certain PDF This heavily implies document or object level cases

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Self Correction on Resume Editing vs Open Document When a user switches back to a document from the perspective of that case its a re entry into the process Resume Work is good Lets stick to standard terms Open Document initial Resume Work returning after switch Edit Document Save Document Close Document

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait for the Email case Is it Open Email at 090145 The SWITCH action goes from Word to Chrome The next CLICK is Open Email about Annual Meeting So the switch itself is just navigating to the app but the Open Email event is the real start of the case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The prompt asks for a table with Case ID Activity Name Timestamp and optional additional attributes Lets include Resource and Document or Object as they add valuable context

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets map the raw log line by line to the event log

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Self Correction on Email Annual Meeting The SWITCH event at 090145 does not specify Annual Meeting The connection to the Annual Meeting is made at 090200 with Open Email about Annual Meeting Since the case ID is derived from the logical object being worked on Email Annual Meeting is inferred from the action at 090200 The preceding navigation to the inbox is part of this case

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Self Correction on 085950 FOCUS on Quarterly Report docx The user focuses on Quarterly Report then 10 seconds later focuses on Document1 They did not type or save Just opened or viewed it Then they come back to it at 090715 Mapping the 085950 to Open Document and 090715 to Resume Document is perfect

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Explanation of Logic Case Identification Grouped events by the logical object being manipulated for example Document1 docx Budget 2024 xlsx Email Annual Meeting This reflects the object centric nature of modern work where a case is the specific item being processed

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Activity Naming Abstracted raw system signals FOCUS SWITCH TYPING CLICK into business relevant process steps Open Document Edit Document Save Document Reply to Email Compose Email and others

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Event Sequencing and Interruptions Handled the interleaving of tasks by mapping SWITCH actions back to an ongoing document case as a Resume Document step capturing the reality of multitasking without breaking the continuity of the individual case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Reviewing the prompt requirements Data Transformation done Case Identification done Activity Naming done Event Attributes included Coherent Narrative yes Explanation will provide the summary logic after the table
